title: Ornalrist 6cm Crystal Ball Engraved Praying Angel Cherub Wings Holds Heart Statue Figurine Paperweight with Metal Stand, Cherub Angel Baby Memorial Sympathy Gifts for Women Men
features: Exquisite Crafts: Our crystal ball is made from k9 material, no bubbles, distortions, color or inclusions. This lifelike cherub figurine is engraved in our crystal ball by advanced laser engraving technology, making it seems vivid and realistic, will not fade ot rub off. About the metal stand, it has three beautiful vivid roses, made by metal, will not fade easily

Wonderful Home Ornaments: Each cherub crystal ball is clear, the ball is placed on the beautiful metal rose base, you can freely put them on your bedside table, desk, bookshelf, coffee table in the living room, etc., as a perfect decorative ornaments

Cherub Gifts: Angel baby means love, happinesse, and peace, our cherub gift can be a warm gift for your family, especially for your mum, nanny, wife and your closed friends. It can be a wonderful present for kids, friends or teacher. Or as a Christmas gift, birthday gift,memorial gifts, sympathy gifts, wedding gifts to your mum, dad, family, daughter, son and so on
Dimension: Size: 2.36 in./60mm; Net weight:0.86lb (with a crystal base). Please note the size of the ball before placing order, this is a 6cm ball

Ready to Be A Gift: Each ball is selected by workers carefully. Every ball is packed in a beautiful gift box, there is a wipe and greeting card in the gift box, ready to be a gift to someone you love.
